name: schema-registry-dag-dag-render-gateway
description: T199 DagRenderGateway — DATA_PIPELINE archetype. Returns DAG topology for rendering. Reads from T197 output. Never computes DAG inline — reads pre-built topology record.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: reads pre-built DagTopology from DATABASE only, NEVER computes DAG inline, read-only gateway, T197 output consumption
Retrieve DATA_PIPELINE arch pattern + pre-built-topology-read + read-only-gateway + dag-render patterns for T199
Break T199 into: receive render request → load DagTopology document from DATABASE (T197 output) → return topology for frontend rendering → NEVER recompute adjacency or traverse graph

Generate dag-render-gateway.service.ts — HTTP GET via DynamicController, reads DagTopology document stored by T197, returns pre-built ordered node list and edge set. NEVER calls T191 cycle detector or traverses adjacency inline. Read-only — no mutations. Returns 404 if topology not yet built.
Named check validation: reads_prebuilt_topology_only, never_computes_inline, read_only_no_mutations, returns_404_if_not_built, no_cycle_detector_call
Score generated code 0-100 against T199 iron rules: pre-built read only, no inline DAG computation, read-only gateway, correct 404 handling
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=prebuilt-topology-read+read-only-return, rejected=inline-dag-compute OR calling-T191-on-read OR traversing-adjacency-in-gateway. curriculumTier=1.
